hallucination.rationale: The generated note is entirely the model's thinking/planning process and never produces an actual clinical note. There is no final output to evaluate for hallucination, but the lack of any completed note means it fundamentally failed.

instruction_following.rationale: The output is entirely a thinking/reasoning process and does not produce a completed clinical note. The instructions explicitly state to return ONLY the completed note with no preamble or explanations.

completeness.rationale: No actual clinical note was generated. The output is only internal reasoning/planning text, so no transcript content was captured in a proper note format.
missed_items: All transcript content — no note was produced

template_adherence.rationale: No structured clinical note was output. The entire output is unstructured thinking/planning text rather than a note following the template.

entity_marking.rationale: No entity marking was applied in any final output since no clinical note was produced.

duplication.rationale: The thinking process contains massive amounts of repeated/duplicated reasoning loops about the Physical Examination section structure.
